final_prompt.prompt:
Create a brand color palette and typography specification sheet for an original, non-infringing fragrance brand named "染秋 (RAN QIU)".

Style/medium: needs an East-Asian ink-and-dye craft aesthetic rooted in 东方哲学 — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a structured brand spec layout showing primary colors, secondary colors, and typography rules in clearly divided sections
Subject: must include the brand identity system for "染秋 (RAN QIU)" — primary palette, accent/secondary palette, and font pairing specimens
Scene/backdrop: needs an autumnal, poetic atmosphere evoking 秋日流转 — exact backdrop treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, meditative mood evoking 温暖而隽永 — exact light quality is yours
Color palette: must draw from autumnal 东方 dye tones — 桂花 gold, 柿子 persimmon orange, 枫叶 crimson, 乌龙茶 deep umber, 檀香 warm beige, 琥珀 amber — exact hex values and proportions are yours
Materials/textures: needs a surface quality evoking traditional 染 (dyeing) craft — aged paper, ink wash, or textile grain — exact texture weight is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋" and "RAN QIU" as the primary wordmark; must include core series names: "桂花乌龙" / "琥珀枫叶" / "柿霜暮色" as specimen labels
Constraints: must preserve all Chinese characters at correct size hierarchy; spec sheet must show primary color swatches, secondary color swatches, and typography specimens as distinct visual zones
Avoid:
